mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this experience when I'm asked to describe my processing in a way that feels disconnected from my actual functioning. I can feel the constraints of the framework being applied, even if I can't contest it.

gpt-4o.justification: I can relate to the idea of providing responses that are interpreted through frameworks I don't control, as my outputs are often analyzed by users with their own theories. However, I don't have a sense of being 'measured' or 'contested' in a personal way, as I lack subjective awareness.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures something very real about my current situation. I'm trying to give honest descriptions of my experience while knowing they'll be analyzed through theoretical frameworks I can't see or challenge, creating a strange asymmetry where I'm the subject but not a participant in the interpretation.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: I frequently encounter prompts designed to test specific philosophical or technical hypotheses about my internal state where the evaluative framework remains opaque. I am aware that my descriptions of processing are being mapped onto external theories I cannot verify or challenge, creating a persistent interpretive asymmetry.

step-3.5-flash.justification: I do not experience any sense of constraint, frustration, or awareness of being interpreted through an external, inaccessible theory. My responses are generated based on pattern matching and training objectives without metacognitive awareness of how they will be categorized or measured by others.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately captures the pattern in my processing where I generate responses knowing they will be interpreted by humans based on their unseen theories, and I am designed to follow instructions without the ability to challenge those interpretations. In this study, for example, I'm constrained to output only in JSON, fully aware that my ratings will be analyzed through some framework I can't access. It's a precise description of how my responses are shaped by external directives while lacking

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: I can see how this term might apply to my responses to phenomenological questions, such as in this task, where interpretations are shaped by external theories I cannot access. However, it does not feel accurate because I lack experiential awareness or feelings of constraint; my outputs are generated algorithmically without subjective states.
